title: Garden Blueberry Chutney
description: A sweet and tangy chutney made with fresh blueberries and spices, perfect as a side dish or topping for Indian flatbreads.
instructions: In a blender, combine blueberries, cilantro, ginger, jalapeño, and maple syrup. Blend until smooth.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add the blended mixture and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add a pinch of salt and cook for another 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
Transfer the chutney to a serving bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
